calendar.matters:
Noltice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF DUSAN S.R.L.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert J. Perkiss, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Dusan S.R.L., an Intalian organization.
No appearance by defendant the Wilkes Bashford Company, a corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on September 2, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 2, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, September 15, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Dusan S.R.L., an Italian organization, and against the Defaulted Defendant the Wilkes Bashford Company, a corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $87,039.52.
Prejudgment Interest - $2.600.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $90,064.52.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Dusan S. R. L.

Plaintiff Dusan S. R. L.'s Application for right to attach order and writ of attachment granted. Writ of attachment shall issue in the amount of Plaintiff's account in Euro's, converted to dollars based on value on date of filing compliment. No writ shall issue until $10,000 bond has been filed. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
